forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 10pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 49. North northwest wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. East wind 2 to 7 mph.

forecast.name: Friday Night
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 2am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 52, with temperatures rising to around 56 overnight. South southeast wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 67. Southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
